testcase.name: testBuildUnion
testcase.system-out: Generated SQL: SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum,B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM (SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map1 UNION ALL SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map2 UNION ALL SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map36 UNION ALL SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map37 UNION ALL SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map38 UNION ALL SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map39 UNION ALL SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map40 UNION ALL SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map41 UNION ALL SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map42 UNION ALL SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map43 UNION ALL SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map44 UNION ALL SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map45 UNION ALL SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map46 UNION ALL SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map47 UNION ALL SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map48 UNION ALL SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map49 UNION ALL SELECT A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum FROM map50) AS window_union GROUP BY A_resname, A_resnum, A_resatom, A_atomnum, B_resname, B_resnum, B_resatom, B_atomnum HAVING COUNT(*) >= 25 AND COUNT(*) < 50;

testcase.name: testSubmitUnionWithMocks
testcase.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/data/data/com.termux/files/home/.m2/repository/net/bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.14.8/byte-buddy-agent-1.14.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
